## Summary

_What does this PR do? Link the issue it closes: Closes #_

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code improvement (no behaviour change)
- [ ] `test` — Tests only
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation
- [ ] `chore` — Build / config change

## Changes Made

- 
- 

## Testing Done

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`php artisan test` / `flutter test`)
- [ ] Manually tested the feature end-to-end
- [ ] Edge cases handled and tested

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows Fat Service, Thin Controller pattern
- [ ] No business logic in controllers or UI widgets
- [ ] API responses use `ApiResponse` trait format
- [ ] Form Requests used for validation (no controller validation)
- [ ] Authorization via Policy (not manual user ID check)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` values hardcoded
- [ ] Conventional commit messages used
